name: @astraldeep/web-ci
description: Lock-pinned CI-only lint and browser tooling for AstralDeep

scripts.check:package-manager: node --input-type=module --eval "const match = /(?:^| )npm\/([^ ]+)/u.exec(process.env.npm_config_user_agent ?? ''); if (match?.[1] !== '11.16.0') throw new Error('expected npm 11.16.0 via Corepack, received ' + (match?.[1] ?? 'unknown')); console.log('npm 11.16.0 is active via Corepack');"
scripts.check:product-isolation: node --input-type=module --eval "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; import { resolve } from 'node:path'; const root = resolve('../..'); const dockerfile = readFileSync(resolve(root, 'Dockerfile'), 'utf8'); if (dockerfile.includes('tooling/web-ci') || /^\s*COPY\s+\.\/?\s+/mi.test(dockerfile)) throw new Error('Dockerfile would copy CI-only web tooling into the product image'); const dependencies = ['@eslint/js', '@playwright/test', 'eslint', 'espree', 'globals', 'v8-to-istanbul']; for (const relative of ['backend/requirements.txt', 'windows-client/requirements.txt']) { const manifest = readFileSync(resolve(root, relative), 'utf8'); for (const dependency of dependencies) { if (manifest.includes(dependency)) throw new Error(dependency + ' leaked into ' + relative); } } console.log('CI-only web tooling is isolated from product manifests and image');"
